subject: fix(header): split search button into headerTitle, filters into headerRight
body:
Extract SearchButton as a separate export so it stays in headerTitle
alongside the title (left side). HeaderFilters now only contains the
fuel type and radius dropdowns, grouped with burger menu in headerRight.

Layout: [FuelHunt | Search...] [Fuel | Radius | ☰]
